ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sentence_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sentence pair */,
  "sentence_a" TEXT /* First sentence in the pair */,
  "sentence_b" TEXT /* Second sentence in the pair */,
  "entailment_label" TEXT /* Label indicating the entailment relationship (e.g., ENTAILMENT, CONTRADICTION, NEUTRAL) */,
  "relatedness_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relatedness of the sentences */,
  "entailment_ab" TEXT /* Entailment direction from sentence A to sentence B */,
  "entailment_ba" TEXT /* Entailment direction from sentence B to sentence A */,
  "sentence_a_original" TEXT /* Original text of sentence A */,
  "sentence_b_original" TEXT /* Original text of sentence B */,
  "sentence_a_dataset" TEXT /* Dataset from which sentence A originates */,
  "sentence_b_dataset" TEXT /* Dataset from which sentence B originates */,
  "semeval_set" TEXT /* SemEval set classification for the tasks */,
  "label_kalouli" TEXT /* Kalouli label for the relationship */,
  "label_current_paper" TEXT /* Current paper label for the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the sentence pair is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentence_pairs_sentence_b_dataset FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_b_dataset") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentence_pairs_sentence_a_dataset FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_a_dataset") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentence_pairs_entailment_label FOREIGN KEY ("entailment_label") REFERENCES entailment_labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset (e.g., FLICKR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., author, organization) */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entailment_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entailment label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the entailment label (e.g., ENTAILMENT, CONTRADICTION) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entailment relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relatedness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relatedness score entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence pair */,
  "relatedness_score" REAL /* The relatedness score assigned to the pair */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of the relatedness score (e.g., human-annotated, algorithm-generated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relatedness_scores_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES sentence_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence pair being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES sentence_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task (e.g., entailment detection) */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., training, evaluation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence pair this label is associated with */,
  "label_type" TEXT /* Type of label (e.g., Kalouli, current paper) */,
  "label_value" TEXT /* Value of the label (e.g., NEUTRAL, ENTAILMENT) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES sentence_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence pair being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Score indicating the sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment analysis (e.g., human-annotated, algorithm-generated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES sentence_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entailment_detection" (
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entailment detection entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence pair being analyzed */,
  "entailment_likelihood" REAL /* Score indicating the likelihood of entailment */,
  "entailment_type" TEXT /* Type of entailment detection (e.g., human-annotated, algorithm-generated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entailment_detection_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES sentence_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model training log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model being trained */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the training occurred */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Time when the training occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence pair being collaborated on */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES sentence_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
